name: Holographic Companion
blurb: A 3D companion that follows you through the Nexus; companions housed in-repo.
how_to_play: Enter via the Commons Portal (portal.html) — the hub loads this app in a sandboxed iframe and streams its data from this repo over raw.githubusercontent. To contribute content (a scene, a companion), append a signed file under state/ and PR it.
note: Portal world: the app's CODE is the surface_url; its DATA/state is housed here and streamed via raw CDN. Loaded by portal.html through a portal iframe.
